journeys.title: First-time visitor: landing loads and the value is obvious

evidence.hero:
Access Your
          Memory
          Free Industrial Tools

journeys.title: Visitor joins the early-access waitlist and gets confirmation (→ early_access_emails)
Curious visitor explores How-It-Works + opens an FAQ before committing
Visitor reaches a free tool from the landing ("Free to use — sign up to start")

evidence.rowText: Free to use, sign up to start:
evidence.note: free-platform: tool CTAs open signup (truthful), no stale guest promise

journeys.title: Returning worker opens the Sign-In modal, recovers from a bad password, then lands on home
Signed-in worker: home becomes the operational launchpad with a personalized greeting
Home KPI tiles show real counts that match the canonical truth views (and honor the calm-empty contract)
Today's One Thing gives ONE truthful verdict + role-correct primary actions (worker vs supervisor)
From home, reach My Open Jobs + All Tools, deep-link to a tool, and sign out cleanly
Log a new repair/breakdown captured against the right machine
Record downtime when closing a fix so MTTR stays truthful
Resolve (close) an open job so the Open backlog + KPI drop
Review my own logbook history + find a past repair by search/filter
Supervisor browses the whole team feed, hive-scoped (no cross-tenant bleed)
Export my logbook entries to CSV for an offline report/audit
Add a new spare part to inventory
Use (deduct) stock from a part for a job
Restock a part to replenish quantity on hand
Find a part by name/number/category/stock level
Open a part's detail card (stock, linked assets, txn history)
Schedule a new maintenance task onto the day plan
Place an open logbook job onto the schedule
Mark a scheduled item Done and close the linked logbook job
Read the day-plan verdict + counts to decide what to work on
Supervisor opens the team roster — every active member, count-integrity
Supervisor removes (kicks) a member → status=kicked + audit
Supervisor approves a pending part → status=approved + published
Supervisor can reach Reset-PW for a worker (affordance + gate; reset itself = prior gate)

evidence.note: affordance+gate verified; actual reset = validate_password_recovery (prior arc)

journeys.title: Supervisor reveals the hive invite code
Supervisor reviews the hive action log (audit)
See overdue / due-soon / compliance at a glance (matches the truth view)
Open an overdue asset + see its overdue tasks (badges match the view)
Complete a PM task — findings logged + persisted

evidence.toast: ✓ PM done → PM compliance recomputed on

journeys.title: Supervisor adds a PM asset via the wizard (+ worker is gated out)
Post a message to the hive board
React to a teammate's post with an emoji
Open a thread and reply
Soft-delete my own post (reversible)
Read the reliability verdict (OEE/MTBF/PM) at a glance
Change the analysis window (30d) → KPIs recompute
Diagnostic phase — why failures happen
Prescriptive phase — AI action plan (or deterministic ranking)

evidence.note: AI plan OR deterministic ranking renders

journeys.title: Supervisor recomputes hive risk scores on demand
Ask the AI assistant a question → grounded non-empty answer

evidence.note: grounded LLM reply envelope (deep value = probabilistic, attributed to grounding contract)

journeys.title: Worker reviews which records are available as AI context
Worker rates an AI reply → feedback persists
Switch from Chat to the embedded Voice Journal tab
Fleet health rollup (total / critical / pending)
Open an asset 360 — true history rollup
Per-asset Risk Profile (score/level/MTBF) or honest empty
Ask Asset Brain a grounded question about the asset
Read the alert intelligence rollup
Filter the feed by signal type (Risk)
Acknowledge a fused anomaly signal

evidence.note: anomaly engine Stair-3+ maturity-gated (honest hidden); ack proven by alerthub_ack__status nerve (attributed)

journeys.title: Review + approve the AMC daily brief
Supervisor reads the who-did-what feed
Filter the audit log by action
Expand an entry detail + export CSV
Worker is correctly DENIED the audit log (supervisor-only gate)
Browse past voice-journal entries (history truthful to DB)
Search/filter past entries
Set companion persona — persists to worker_profiles
Record→transcribe→reply surface reachable (live mic attributed)

evidence.note: live record needs a mic stream headless cannot supply → transcription round-trip attributed to validate_ai_live_invoke (Arc H)

journeys.title: AI-health verdict + 3 cards (or honest maturity-empty)
Recommended action + drill into per-function AI detail
Worker honestly gated until Stair 2 (or full dashboard)
Compile the print-ready analytics report
Executive KPIs are truthful (PM compliance shown==DB)
Switch report period + audience pivot
Edit cover + save as PDF (print path)
Run Bearing Life (L10) → correct ISO 281 result

evidence.sample: Tip: Click any underlined field to edit before downloading. In the print dialog, uncheck "Headers and footers" for a cl

journeys.title: Save a calc to hive history + find it again
Global search finds the right calculator
Generate a procurement BOM + Scope of Works from a calc
Supervisor creates a project via the wizard
Add a WBS scope item to a project
Mark a scope item done → project progress rolls up
Log daily progress (with a blocker)
AI pre-fills a project from a plain-language description

evidence.note: AI intent pre-fills wizard; no DB write by itself

journeys.title: Open a compiled project status report
EVM KPI strip — budget computed truthfully
Generate an AI-drafted handover narrative
Skill matrix truthfully renders the worker badges (badge→level)

evidence.note: badge→level render truthful; quiz-earn flow is the write twin (nerve proven)

journeys.title: Raise a discipline target → persists to skill_profiles
Growth at a glance (XP/level/tier truthful)
Per-domain badge grid + expand a domain
Auto-fill resume from WorkHive skill/profile/logbook data
Save resume to the cloud (owner-scoped resume_documents)
Preview + export the resume (JSON/PDF)
Visitor browses listings by section + search (free, no sign-in to read)
Post a new marketplace listing (free to list)
Save a listing to my watchlist + see it in My Saved
Contact a seller about a listing (the free alternative to checkout)
Save the current search so I can re-run it later
Edit one of my draft listings and re-submit it
Reply to a buyer inquiry and mark it replied
Save my Messenger handle so buyers can reach me directly (free contact)
View my seller performance (views/inquiries/conversion)
Import CMMS work-order history (CSV) for cold-start analytics
Configure + test a Live CMMS Sync connection (external SAP/Maximo API)
See CMMS integration health at a glance
Check gateway API health (7-day success rate) — truthful to the audit log

evidence.apiCard: API health (7d) No traffic No gateway calls in last 7 days IDLE

journeys.title: Expand engineering details to inspect raw configs/syncs/audit
